texto: If there has been one overriding change in poetic practice, it is that under the influence of free verse the poets have made a primary virtue out of exactitude and economy of meaning: this has replaced metrical skill as the first thing the poet tunes to.
explicacao: Citação de Martin Langford sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If there has been one overriding change in poetic practice, it is that under the influence of fre…” articula reflexao, poetry, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
